description: This stylish sling bag from murcia is designed for the fashion conscious. Wear it on your shoulder and turn heads wherever you go! Height:23 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 10 cm Synthetic ostrich leather design upper Two main compartments with a zippered pocket and mobile pouch Two short handles with contrast stitched detailing Zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
